Host School · Chiang Mai

Why Wichai Wittaya School?

Not just any school. Your students will be hosted at Chiang Mai's most internationally active secondary school — the best environment for a transformative learning experience.

🏆
Chiang Mai's #1 English-taught school — the highest concentration of English-medium instruction and certified international educators in the region.
🌏
Most international project medals in Chiang Mai — students here compete and win at science olympiads and innovation competitions worldwide.
🤝
Active international buddy program — visiting students are paired with Thai peers for cultural exchange, language practice, and lifelong friendships.
✅
Full Halal compliance — all meals throughout the program are Halal-certified, reviewed and approved by the school's international program committee.
Our Programmes

Two destinations. One turnkey model.

Offer your students a choice — both programs share the same AI & STEM curriculum with different city experiences and price points.

Nature + Tech
📍 Chiang Mai, Thailand
AI & STEM Chiang Mai
Hosted at Wichai Wittaya School. Includes Elephant Sanctuary, Night Bazaar, international buddy sessions, and Orphanage Masterclass.
$695 USD / student
FD871 · HAN→CNX · Nonstop 5 flights/week July 5–11 open
✦ Premium City
📍 Bangkok, Thailand
AI & STEM Bangkok
Hosted at Chindamanee School. Includes Wat Arun, Chao Phraya dinner cruise, science centers, and Bangkok landmarks.
$895 USD / student
VN/PG · HAN→BKK · Nonstop Departs 12:45 PM Dates on demand

FD871 · HAN → CNX · 15:20–17:00

Sun · Mon · Tue · Thu · Fri · Sat

Student Profile

Built for upper secondary students

This is not a general children's camp. The curriculum and experience are specifically designed for teenage learners aged 14–18 who are ready for real-world skills.

14–18
The ideal student for this program
  • Secondary school student, Grades 9–12
  • Curious about technology, AI, and the future of work
  • Wants international exposure and English practice
  • Ready to collaborate with students from other countries
  • Looking for a standout credential for university applications
  • Parents who value safe, structured, Halal-certified travel
Program Timeline

7 days. Every hour planned.

A structured, mentor-led itinerary balancing STEM learning, English practice, cultural exploration, and evening social activities.

Day 1
Arrival
  • Afternoon flight from Hanoi
  • Airport welcome & transfer
  • Hotel check-in
  • Welcome dinner
Day 2
AI Pitch
  • English & AI pitch training
  • Elephant Sanctuary*
  • Night Bazaar walk
Day 3
Vlogging
  • AI Vlogging lessons
  • International Buddy session
  • Orphanage Masterclass*
Day 4
Vlogging+
  • Vlogging continuation
  • Afternoon study trip
  • Evening with mentors
Day 5
Arduino
  • English & Arduino
  • Afternoon study trip
  • Evening with mentors
Day 6
Arduino+
  • Final prototype build
  • Afternoon study trip
  • Demo Day prep
Day 7
Graduation
  • Graduation ceremony
  • Co-branded certificates
  • Airport send-off

* Chiang Mai excursions shown. Bangkok program: Wat Arun, Chao Phraya dinner cruise, science centers.

3 Skill Tracks

What students build & take home

Three portfolio-ready outputs — taught entirely in English by certified educators. Real skills, not worksheets.

🚀
AI Start-Up Pitch
Entrepreneurship
  • Identify a real-world problem
  • Design an AI-powered solution
  • Build a compelling pitch deck
  • Live investor Q&A presentation
🎬
AI Vlogging
Content Creation
  • Scriptwriting & storyboarding
  • Smartphone cinematography
  • AI-assisted video editing
  • Publish a finished travel vlog
🔌
Arduino STEM
Engineering
  • Hardware, sensors & circuits
  • Block-based and text coding
  • Build a physical prototype
  • Demo Day presentation
Meet the Director
Nurbakyt Boltayev
Founder & Director · Emerald Horizon Ventures

Based in Chiang Mai with deep roots in international education across Asia, Nurbakyt built Emerald Horizon Ventures around one idea: that students from Vietnam, Myanmar, China and across Southeast Asia deserve access to world-class STEM education experiences — not just locally, but internationally. Emerald Horizon is registered in Hong Kong and operates programs at two accredited Thai schools with a full Halal-certified infrastructure.

🇭🇰 Registered in Hong Kong 📍 Based in Chiang Mai ✉ emeraldhv@nurbakyt.com
Partner Benefits

What your school gets

Become a premium international program provider without the overhead. We handle everything on the ground.

01
Turnkey Operations
We manage 100% of ground logistics — accommodation, all meals, transport, curriculum, and venue. Zero admin burden for your team.
02
Free Chaperone Travel
One teacher or staff member travels free on-the-ground for every 15-student cohort — a powerful staff retention and team reward tool.
03
Co-Branded Credentials
Co-branded certificates, promotional materials, and professional event photography to elevate your center's international reputation.
04
Full Halal Compliance
All meals throughout both programs are Halal-certified — complete comfort for Muslim students and their families.
05
Flexible Scheduling
Programs align with Vietnamese school holidays. Dates scheduled around your demand. March–April and June–July windows available.
06
24/7 On-Ground Support
Emergency contingency fund, 24/7 support team, and comprehensive group travel insurance coordination — all included.

Ready to send your
students to Thailand?

We'll send the full partnership deck and program guide within 24 hours. B2B inquiries only — we work exclusively with schools and language centers.
